docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STYPMANN, RICHARD $2,499.00 PRINCIPAL, $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00, TRIAL HELD 8/31/05 BOTH PARTIES SUBMITTED. COURT STATED TENTATIVE RULING; PARTIES ORDERED PRESENT 9/7/05 AT 10:30 AM FOR SETTLEMENT OR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT STYPMANN ARRIVED AT 10:40 AM BUT LEFT COURTROOM. AS OF 11:05 AM, DEFENDANT HAD NOT APPEARED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT STYPMANN, RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-18-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-31-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR MATTER TO BE HEARD BY A SUPERIOR COURT JUDGE. THE DEFENDANT FILED A DISQUALIFICATION OF COMM. ROSEN-PARK PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 170.1(A)(B)(C)
DECLARATION FILED BY DEFT CHALLENGING COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK PER CCP 170.1(A)(B)(C) IN OPEN COURT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.99 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT STYPMANN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED 10/04/05 3:30 PM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES FILED BY DEFT. ORDER GRANTED.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27984, RECORD TRANSFERRED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STYPMANN, RICHARD
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTC ORDER FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-18-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-18-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RECORD REMANDED BACK TO SUPERIOR COURT (APPEAL ABANDONED)
